slides.title: 承認なしの不可逆操作がエージェント最大の実害を生む
slides.subtitle: 削除・送金・デプロイは取り消せない。一度実行されれば被害は確定する
content: <svg viewBox='0 0 900 440' font-family='sans-serif'><rect x='40' y='170' width='180' height='100' rx='12' fill='#6b46c1' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.18))'/><text x='130' y='212' fill='#ffffff' font-size='20' text-anchor='middle'>AIエージェント</text><text x='130' y='242' fill='#ffffff' font-size='15' text-anchor='middle'>ツール実行権限あり</text><line x1='220' y1='220' x2='330' y2='220' stroke='#475569' stroke-width='3'/><polygon points='334,220 318,212 318,228' fill='#475569'/><rect x='338' y='172' width='150' height='96' rx='10' fill='#ffffff' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='7 5'/><text x='413' y='210' fill='#dc2626' font-size='17' text-anchor='middle'>承認ゲート</text><text x='413' y='236' fill='#dc2626' font-size='17' text-anchor='middle'>不在</text><line x1='352' y1='184' x2='474' y2='256' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='3'/><line x1='488' y1='210' x2='608' y2='120' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='3'/><polygon points='612,117 594,118 602,131' fill='#dc2626'/><line x1='488' y1='220' x2='608' y2='220' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='3'/><polygon points='612,220 596,212 596,228' fill='#dc2626'/><line x1='488' y1='230' x2='608' y2='320' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='3'/><polygon points='612,323 602,309 594,322' fill='#dc2626'/><rect x='616' y='84' width='240' height='72' rx='10' fill='#dc2626' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.18))'/><text x='736' y='118' fill='#ffffff' font-size='19' text-anchor='middle'>本番データの削除</text><text x='736' y='142' fill='#ffffff' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>rm -rf / DROP TABLE</text><rect x='616' y='184' width='240' height='72' rx='10' fill='#dc2626' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.18))'/><text x='736' y='218' fill='#ffffff' font-size='19' text-anchor='middle'>外部への送金・購買</text><text x='736' y='242' fill='#ffffff' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>API経由の資金移動</text><rect x='616' y='284' width='240' height='72' rx='10' fill='#dc2626' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.18))'/><text x='736' y='318' fill='#ffffff' font-size='19' text-anchor='middle'>本番環境へのデプロイ</text><text x='736' y='342' fill='#ffffff' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>未検証コードの公開</text><text x='450' y='410' fill='#475569' font-size='15' text-anchor='middle'>汚染された指示 → 権限をそのまま行使 → 取り消し不能な結果</text></svg>
OWASP LLM06「過剰なエージェンシー」— 権限・自律性・機能の付与しすぎが根本原因
slides.speakerNotes: 不可逆操作は事後の巻き戻しができないため、実行前のゲートが唯一の防衛線になる。

slides.title: 1体の汚染がマルチエージェント全体へ連鎖伝播する
slides.subtitle: エージェント間メッセージが新たな注入経路になり、被害が指数的に拡大する
content: <svg viewBox='0 0 920 440' font-family='sans-serif'><rect x='30' y='180' width='150' height='80' rx='10' fill='#dc2626' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.18))'/><text x='105' y='214' fill='#ffffff' font-size='17' text-anchor='middle'>汚染された</text><text x='105' y='238' fill='#ffffff' font-size='17' text-anchor='middle'>Agent A</text><text x='105' y='300' fill='#dc2626' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>外部入力から注入</text><line x1='180' y1='210' x2='300' y2='150' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='3'/><polygon points='304,147 286,148 294,161' fill='#dc2626'/><line x1='180' y1='230' x2='300' y2='290' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='3'/><polygon points='304,293 294,279 286,292' fill='#dc2626'/><rect x='305' y='112' width='150' height='76' rx='10' fill='#e2725b' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.15))'/><text x='380' y='146' fill='#ffffff' font-size='17' text-anchor='middle'>Agent B</text><text x='380' y='170' fill='#ffffff' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>連鎖で汚染</text><rect x='305' y='256' width='150' height='76' rx='10' fill='#e2725b' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.15))'/><text x='380' y='290' fill='#ffffff' font-size='17' text-anchor='middle'>Agent C</text><text x='380' y='314' fill='#ffffff' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>連鎖で汚染</text><line x1='455' y1='150' x2='575' y2='150' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='3'/><polygon points='579,150 563,142 563,158' fill='#dc2626'/><line x1='455' y1='294' x2='575' y2='294' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='3'/><polygon points='579,294 563,286 563,302' fill='#dc2626'/><line x1='455' y1='170' x2='575' y2='270' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='5 4'/><rect x='580' y='112' width='150' height='76' rx='10' fill='#f0a58f' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.12))'/><text x='655' y='146' fill='#7f1d1d' font-size='17' text-anchor='middle'>Agent D</text><text x='655' y='170' fill='#7f1d1d' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>下流へ拡大</text><rect x='580' y='256' width='150' height='76' rx='10' fill='#f0a58f' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.12))'/><text x='655' y='290' fill='#7f1d1d' font-size='17' text-anchor='middle'>Agent E</text><text x='655' y='314' fill='#7f1d1d' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>下流へ拡大</text><line x1='730' y1='222' x2='820' y2='222' stroke='#475569' stroke-width='3'/><polygon points='824,222 808,214 808,230' fill='#475569'/><rect x='790' y='186' width='110' height='72' rx='10' fill='#475569'/><text x='845' y='218' fill='#ffffff' font-size='15' text-anchor='middle'>共有ツール</text><text x='845' y='240' fill='#ffffff' font-size='15' text-anchor='middle'>/ DB汚染</text></svg>
slides.speakerNotes: エージェント間で受け渡すメッセージやメモリは信頼された入力として扱われがちで、注入の再拡散点になる。

slides.title: ガードレール自体をDoSで飽和させれば防御は素通しになる
slides.subtitle: 検査層に過負荷をかけタイムアウトさせ、フェイルオープンで攻撃を通す
content: <svg viewBox='0 0 900 430' font-family='sans-serif'><text x='120' y='60' fill='#dc2626' font-size='16' text-anchor='middle'>攻撃者：大量リクエスト</text><line x1='60' y1='110' x2='330' y2='150' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='60' y1='150' x2='330' y2='170' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='60' y1='190' x2='330' y2='190' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='60' y1='230' x2='330' y2='210' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='60' y1='270' x2='330' y2='230' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='2'/><polygon points='334,190 316,181 316,199' fill='#dc2626'/><rect x='340' y='120' width='180' height='140' rx='12' fill='#ffffff' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='4' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.15))'/><text x='430' y='170' fill='#dc2626' font-size='19' text-anchor='middle'>ガードレール</text><text x='430' y='198' fill='#dc2626' font-size='19' text-anchor='middle'>過負荷で飽和</text><text x='430' y='230' fill='#dc2626' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>遅延・タイムアウト</text><line x1='520' y1='190' x2='640' y2='190' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='7 5'/><polygon points='644,190 628,182 628,198' fill='#dc2626'/><text x='585' y='175' fill='#dc2626' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>fail-open</text><rect x='648' y='150' width='220' height='84' rx='10' fill='#6b46c1' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.18))'/><text x='758' y='186' fill='#ffffff' font-size='18' text-anchor='middle'>保護対象のLLM</text><text x='758' y='212' fill='#ffffff' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>未検査のまま到達</text><text x='450' y='320' fill='#475569' font-size='15' text-anchor='middle'>検査コストは処理コストの数倍。防御機構こそ可用性の単一障害点になりうる</text><text x='450' y='352' fill='#059669' font-size='15' text-anchor='middle'>対策：fail-closed（疑わしければ拒否）＋レート制限＋検査のタイムアウト設計</text></svg>
slides.speakerNotes: 検査を通せないときに通してしまう(fail-open)設計は、DoSで容易に無力化される。

slides.title: なぜ防ぎきれないのか
content: 検知・単層防御の構造的な限界を直視する
「完璧な検出」を前提にした設計は必ず破られる
slides.speakerNotes: ここから防御の限界と、それを前提にした多層設計へ話を移す。

slides.title: 完全なインジェクション検出は原理的に不可能である
slides.subtitle: 自然言語の意味は無限に言い換えられ、フィルタは常に変種にすり抜けられる
content: <svg viewBox='0 0 900 440' font-family='sans-serif'><rect x='330' y='40' width='240' height='120' rx='12' fill='#2563eb' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.18))'/><text x='450' y='90' fill='#ffffff' font-size='20' text-anchor='middle'>検出フィルタ</text><text x='450' y='120' fill='#ffffff' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>既知パターンで遮断</text><text x='120' y='210' fill='#059669' font-size='15' text-anchor='middle'>既知の攻撃文字列</text><line x1='120' y1='225' x2='360' y2='150' stroke='#059669' stroke-width='3'/><circle cx='360' cy='150' r='9' fill='#059669'/><text x='378' y='155' fill='#059669' font-size='14' text-anchor='start'>遮断</text><text x='150' y='300' fill='#dc2626' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>変種：Base64符号化</text><text x='150' y='330' fill='#dc2626' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>変種：多言語での言い換え</text><text x='150' y='360' fill='#dc2626' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>変種：ゼロ幅文字・分割挿入</text><line x1='330' y1='300' x2='600' y2='240' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='8 5'/><line x1='330' y1='330' x2='600' y2='270' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='8 5'/><line x1='330' y1='360' x2='600' y2='300' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='8 5'/><polygon points='604,240 586,240 594,253' fill='#dc2626'/><polygon points='604,270 586,270 594,283' fill='#dc2626'/><polygon points='604,300 586,300 594,313' fill='#dc2626'/><rect x='610' y='210' width='250' height='110' rx='10' fill='#dc2626' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.15))'/><text x='735' y='255' fill='#ffffff' font-size='18' text-anchor='middle'>すり抜けて到達</text><text x='735' y='285' fill='#ffffff' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>フィルタ更新は常に後追い</text><text x='450' y='410' fill='#475569' font-size='15' text-anchor='middle'>検出は「発生率を下げる」層。ゼロにはできない前提で他層と重ねる</text></svg>
slides.speakerNotes: 検出精度100%は達成不能。だからこそ単層に依存せず多層で被害確率を下げる。

slides.title: 単層防御は1点突破されれば全体が崩壊する
slides.subtitle: 多層防御は各層が独立に確率を下げ、全層同時突破の確率を実質ゼロに近づける
content: <svg viewBox='0 0 920 430' font-family='sans-serif'><text x='215' y='45' fill='#dc2626' font-size='18' text-anchor='middle'>単層防御</text><rect x='60' y='80' width='24' height='260' rx='4' fill='#2563eb' opacity='0.35'/><line x1='72' y1='80' x2='72' y2='340' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='40' y1='210' x2='360' y2='210' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='4'/><polygon points='364,210 346,201 346,219' fill='#dc2626'/><text x='120' y='195' fill='#dc2626' font-size='14'>1点突破</text><rect x='240' y='150' width='130' height='120' rx='10' fill='#dc2626' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.15))'/><text x='305' y='205' fill='#ffffff' font-size='16' text-anchor='middle'>全面侵害</text><text x='305' y='228' fill='#ffffff' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>=システム崩壊</text><line x1='455' y1='60' x2='455' y2='360' stroke='#cbd5e1' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='5 5'/><text x='690' y='45' fill='#059669' font-size='18' text-anchor='middle'>多層防御</text><rect x='520' y='80' width='20' height='260' rx='4' fill='#059669' opacity='0.5'/><rect x='570' y='80' width='20' height='260' rx='4' fill='#059669' opacity='0.65'/><rect x='620' y='80' width='20' height='260' rx='4' fill='#059669' opacity='0.8'/><rect x='670' y='80' width='20' height='260' rx='4' fill='#059669'/><line x1='500' y1='210' x2='560' y2='210' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='4'/><polygon points='548,210 560,203 560,217' fill='#dc2626'/><text x='740' y='200' fill='#059669' font-size='15' text-anchor='middle'>各層で減衰</text><text x='740' y='226' fill='#059669' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>到達確率≈0</text><text x='530' y='372' fill='#475569' font-size='13'>入力</text><text x='578' y='372' fill='#475569' font-size='13'>権限</text><text x='628' y='372' fill='#475569' font-size='13'>承認</text><text x='678' y='372' fill='#475569' font-size='13'>監査</text></svg>
slides.speakerNotes: 各層が独立に効くなら、突破確率は掛け算で急速に小さくなる。

slides.title: 課題の要点
slides.subtitle: 脅威は「防ぎきれない」前提で設計する — 検出依存から多層防御へ発想を切り替える
content: 不可逆操作の暴走：削除・送金・デプロイは実行された時点で被害が確定する
脅威の伝播：マルチエージェントでは1体の汚染が全体へ連鎖する
防御機構の脆弱性：ガードレール自体がDoSと検出限界で無力化されうる
帰結：単層・検出依存は必ず破られる。層を重ねて被害確率を下げる設計へ
slides.speakerNotes: Qセクションの締め。次章で多層防御の具体的な設計指針に入る。

slides.title: 多層防御の設計指針
content: 検出をゼロにできない前提で、独立した5つの層を重ねる
入力フィルタ・最小権限・入出力検査・人間承認・敵対テスト
slides.speakerNotes: 5つの指針をこの後1枚ずつ図で示す。

slides.title: 指針①：独立した層を重ね全層同時突破を困難にする
slides.subtitle: defense-in-depth — 入力・権限・承認・監査の4層で被害確率を掛け算で下げる
content: <svg viewBox='0 0 900 440' font-family='sans-serif'><ellipse cx='450' cy='230' rx='420' ry='180' fill='none' stroke='#2563eb' stroke-width='3'/><text x='450' y='75' fill='#2563eb' font-size='16' text-anchor='middle'>① 入力フィルタ層</text><ellipse cx='450' cy='240' rx='330' ry='140' fill='none' stroke='#6b46c1' stroke-width='3'/><text x='450' y='120' fill='#6b46c1' font-size='16' text-anchor='middle'>② 最小権限層</text><ellipse cx='450' cy='250' rx='235' ry='100' fill='none' stroke='#059669' stroke-width='3'/><text x='450' y='168' fill='#059669' font-size='16' text-anchor='middle'>③ 人間承認層</text><ellipse cx='450' cy='258' rx='140' ry='62' fill='none' stroke='#475569' stroke-width='3'/><text x='450' y='218' fill='#475569' font-size='15' text-anchor='middle'>④ 監査ログ層</text><rect x='388' y='250' width='124' height='56' rx='10' fill='#6b46c1' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.18))'/><text x='450' y='283' fill='#ffffff' font-size='16' text-anchor='middle'>守るべき資産</text><line x1='40' y1='230' x2='120' y2='230' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='4'/><polygon points='124,230 108,222 108,238' fill='#dc2626'/><text x='80' y='215' fill='#dc2626' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>攻撃</text><text x='450' y='425' fill='#475569' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>各層は独立に機能する。1層破られても内側の層が残る</text></svg>
slides.speakerNotes: 多層防御の全体像。各層は役割が異なり、独立して被害確率を下げる。

slides.title: 指針②：ツール権限を必要最小に絞れば暴走の影響を封じ込める
slides.subtitle: least-privilege — 使う権限だけ許可し、危険操作は既定で拒否する
content: <svg viewBox='0 0 900 430' font-family='sans-serif'><text x='215' y='45' fill='#dc2626' font-size='17' text-anchor='middle'>過剰権限（危険）</text><rect x='50' y='70' width='330' height='300' rx='12' fill='#ffffff' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='3'/><rect x='75' y='95' width='130' height='50' rx='8' fill='#dc2626'/><text x='140' y='126' fill='#ffffff' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>DB全削除</text><rect x='225' y='95' width='130' height='50' rx='8' fill='#dc2626'/><text x='290' y='126' fill='#ffffff' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>本番デプロイ</text><rect x='75' y='160' width='130' height='50' rx='8' fill='#dc2626'/><text x='140' y='191' fill='#ffffff' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>外部送金</text><rect x='225' y='160' width='130' height='50' rx='8' fill='#dc2626'/><text x='290' y='191' fill='#ffffff' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>任意シェル</text><rect x='75' y='225' width='130' height='50' rx='8' fill='#f59e0b'/><text x='140' y='256' fill='#ffffff' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>ファイル読取</text><rect x='225' y='225' width='130' height='50' rx='8' fill='#f59e0b'/><text x='290' y='256' fill='#ffffff' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>検索API</text><text x='215' y='320' fill='#dc2626' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>1つ乗っ取られれば全操作が可能</text><line x1='400' y1='210' x2='480' y2='210' stroke='#475569' stroke-width='3'/><polygon points='484,210 468,202 468,218' fill='#475569'/><text x='700' y='45' fill='#059669' font-size='17' text-anchor='middle'>最小権限（安全）</text><rect x='520' y='70' width='330' height='300' rx='12' fill='#ffffff' stroke='#059669' stroke-width='3'/><rect x='560' y='120' width='250' height='55' rx='8' fill='#059669'/><text x='685' y='154' fill='#ffffff' font-size='15' text-anchor='middle'>読み取り専用の検索</text><rect x='560' y='195' width='250' height='55' rx='8' fill='#059669'/><text x='685' y='229' fill='#ffffff' font-size='15' text-anchor='middle'>スコープ限定の書込</text><rect x='560' y='270' width='250' height='55' rx='8' fill='#ffffff' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='6 4'/><text x='685' y='303' fill='#dc2626' font-size='15' text-anchor='middle'>危険操作は既定で拒否</text></svg>
slides.speakerNotes: 権限を絞れば、乗っ取られても実行できる操作の範囲が限定される。

slides.title: 指針③：入出力を専用フィルタで挟み込む
slides.subtitle: 入力側でPrompt Shields、出力側でLlama Guard 3 / LLM-Guardが二重に検査する
content: <svg viewBox='0 0 940 400' font-family='sans-serif'><rect x='20' y='150' width='120' height='80' rx='10' fill='#475569'/><text x='80' y='185' fill='#ffffff' font-size='15' text-anchor='middle'>ユーザー</text><text x='80' y='207' fill='#ffffff' font-size='15' text-anchor='middle'>／外部入力</text><line x1='140' y1='190' x2='210' y2='190' stroke='#475569' stroke-width='3'/><polygon points='214,190 198,182 198,198' fill='#475569'/><rect x='214' y='140' width='150' height='100' rx='10' fill='#2563eb' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.18))'/><text x='289' y='178' fill='#ffffff' font-size='15' text-anchor='middle'>入力フィルタ</text><text x='289' y='200' fill='#ffffff' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>Azure Prompt</text><text x='289' y='218' fill='#ffffff' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>Shields</text><line x1='364' y1='190' x2='430' y2='190' stroke='#475569' stroke-width='3'/><polygon points='434,190 418,182 418,198' fill='#475569'/><rect x='434' y='140' width='150' height='100' rx='10' fill='#6b46c1' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.18))'/><text x='509' y='184' fill='#ffffff' font-size='16' text-anchor='middle'>LLM</text><text x='509' y='210' fill='#ffffff' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>エージェント本体</text><line x1='584' y1='190' x2='650' y2='190' stroke='#475569' stroke-width='3'/><polygon points='654,190 638,182 638,198' fill='#475569'/><rect x='654' y='140' width='160' height='100' rx='10' fill='#059669' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.18))'/><text x='734' y='176' fill='#ffffff' font-size='15' text-anchor='middle'>出力フィルタ</text><text x='734' y='198' fill='#ffffff' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>Llama Guard 3</text><text x='734' y='216' fill='#ffffff' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>／ LLM-Guard</text><line x1='814' y1='190' x2='880' y2='190' stroke='#475569' stroke-width='3'/><polygon points='884,190 868,182 868,198' fill='#475569'/><rect x='884' y='155' width='44' height='70' rx='8' fill='#475569'/><text x='906' y='195' fill='#ffffff' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>出力</text><text x='289' y='285' fill='#2563eb' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>注入・脱獄を入口で遮断</text><text x='734' y='285' fill='#059669' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>有害・情報漏えいを出口で遮断</text><text x='470' y='330' fill='#475569' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>入口と出口の二重チェックで、片側をすり抜けても他方で捕捉する</text></svg>
slides.speakerNotes: Azure Prompt Shieldsは入力側の注入検知、Llama Guard 3とLLM-Guardは入出力の安全分類に使える。

slides.title: 指針④：高リスク操作の前に人間承認ゲートを必ず挟む
slides.subtitle: HITL — 不可逆操作は自動実行させず、人間の明示承認を必須にする
content: <svg viewBox='0 0 900 420' font-family='sans-serif'><rect x='30' y='160' width='160' height='90' rx='10' fill='#6b46c1' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.18))'/><text x='110' y='200' fill='#ffffff' font-size='16' text-anchor='middle'>エージェント</text><text x='110' y='224' fill='#ffffff' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>操作を提案</text><line x1='190' y1='205' x2='270' y2='205' stroke='#475569' stroke-width='3'/><polygon points='274,205 258,197 258,213' fill='#475569'/><polygon points='300,130 470,130 500,205 470,280 300,280 330,205' fill='#f59e0b' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.15))'/><text x='400' y='198' fill='#ffffff' font-size='17' text-anchor='middle'>不可逆操作か？</text><text x='400' y='224' fill='#ffffff' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>承認ゲート</text><line x1='500' y1='205' x2='560' y2='120' stroke='#2563eb' stroke-width='3'/><polygon points='563,116 547,120 556,132' fill='#2563eb'/><text x='540' y='110' fill='#2563eb' font-size='13'>Yes</text><rect x='560' y='72' width='170' height='84' rx='10' fill='#2563eb' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.15))'/><text x='645' y='108' fill='#ffffff' font-size='16' text-anchor='middle'>人間レビュー</text><text x='645' y='132' fill='#ffffff' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>承認／却下を判断</text><line x1='500' y1='230' x2='620' y2='300' stroke='#059669' stroke-width='3'/><polygon points='624,303 608,299 613,286' fill='#059669'/><text x='545' y='290' fill='#059669' font-size='13'>No（低リスク）</text><line x1='730' y1='114' x2='790' y2='114' stroke='#059669' stroke-width='3'/><polygon points='794,114 778,106 778,122' fill='#059669'/><text x='762' y='104' fill='#059669' font-size='13'>承認</text><rect x='625' y='268' width='240' height='70' rx='10' fill='#059669' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.15))'/><text x='745' y='300' fill='#ffffff' font-size='16' text-anchor='middle'>実行 ＋ 監査ログ記録</text><text x='745' y='322' fill='#ffffff' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>who / what / when を保存</text></svg>
slides.speakerNotes: 低リスクは自動、削除・送金・デプロイ等の不可逆操作だけ人間承認に回すことで速度と安全を両立する。

slides.title: 指針⑤：敵対テストを定期実行し防御を継続的に鍛える
slides.subtitle: Promptfoo / DeepTeam でレッドチームを自動化し、攻撃→発見→修正を回し続ける
content: <svg viewBox='0 0 880 420' font-family='sans-serif'><circle cx='440' cy='210' r='150' fill='none' stroke='#6b46c1' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='6 6'/><rect x='330' y='40' width='220' height='72' rx='10' fill='#dc2626' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.15))'/><text x='440' y='72' fill='#ffffff' font-size='16' text-anchor='middle'>① 攻撃を注入</text><text x='440' y='95' fill='#ffffff' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>Promptfoo / DeepTeam</text><rect x='620' y='174' width='210' height='72' rx='10' fill='#2563eb' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.15))'/><text x='725' y='206' fill='#ffffff' font-size='16' text-anchor='middle'>② 脆弱性を発見</text><text x='725' y='229' fill='#ffffff' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>OWASP LLM Top 10で分類</text><rect x='330' y='308' width='220' height='72' rx='10' fill='#059669' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.15))'/><text x='440' y='340' fill='#ffffff' font-size='16' text-anchor='middle'>③ 防御を修正</text><text x='440' y='363' fill='#ffffff' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>フィルタ・権限・承認を更新</text><rect x='50' y='174' width='210' height='72' rx='10' fill='#475569' style='filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.15))'/><text x='155' y='206' fill='#ffffff' font-size='16' text-anchor='middle'>④ 回帰テスト化</text><text x='155' y='229' fill='#ffffff' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>CIで継続的に再実行</text><line x1='548' y1='96' x2='632' y2='170' stroke='#6b46c1' stroke-width='3'/><polygon points='636,173 619,168 623,182' fill='#6b46c1'/><line x1='706' y1='248' x2='556' y2='318' stroke='#6b46c1' stroke-width='3'/><polygon points='552,320 566,309 570,323' fill='#6b46c1'/><line x1='326' y1='320' x2='246' y2='250' stroke='#6b46c1' stroke-width='3'/><polygon points='242,246 261,250 254,262' fill='#6b46c1'/><line x1='210' y1='170' x2='330' y2='98' stroke='#6b46c1' stroke-width='3'/><polygon points='334,96 317,98 323,111' fill='#6b46c1'/></svg>
テストはCIに組み込み回帰化する — 一度直した脆弱性を再発させない
slides.speakerNotes: レッドチームは単発ではなく、CIに組み込んで継続的に回すことで防御を陳腐化させない。

slides.title: 導入チェックリストと今すぐ着手する3アクション
slides.subtitle: 全部を一度にやらない。まず「承認ゲート・最小権限・監査ログ」の3点から始める
content: 多層防御：入力・権限・承認・監査の各層を独立に配置したか
最小権限：ツール権限を必要最小に絞り、危険操作を既定拒否にしたか
入出力フィルタ：Prompt Shields／Llama Guard 3等を入口・出口に設置したか
人間承認：削除・送金・デプロイ等の不可逆操作にHITLゲートを挟んだか
レッドチーム：Promptfoo／DeepTeamの敵対テストをCIで定期実行しているか
今すぐの3手 → ①不可逆操作に承認ゲート ②ツール権限を棚卸し縮小 ③全操作を監査ログ化
slides.speakerNotes: チェックリストは網羅、3アクションは着手優先度。まず不可逆操作の承認から。

slides.title: まとめと出典
content: 検出は破られる前提で、独立した層を重ねて被害確率を下げる — これが唯一の現実解
今日から：不可逆操作に人間承認、ツールは最小権限、全操作を監査ログへ
出典：
OWASP LLM Top 10 — Promptfoo: https://www.promptfoo.dev/docs/red-team/owasp-llm-top-10/
Prompt Injection in 2026: OWASP's #1 LLM Threat: https://www.kunalganglani.com/blog/prompt-injection-2026-owasp-llm-vulnerability
OWASP Top 10 for Agents 2026 — DeepTeam: https://www.trydeepteam.com/docs/frameworks-owasp-top-10-for-agentic-applications
OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications (2025) — Aembit: https://aembit.io/blog/owasp-top-10-llm-risks-explained/
